page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8i.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores, resulting in a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio with no hyperthreading.

The hardware profile includes 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per physical core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute performance without resource contention. This balanced configuration of compute and memory resources is designed for workloads such as web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8i.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8475B x86_64 processor operating at 2.7 GHz, featuring 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The instance provides 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It does not contain local storage or onboard GPUs, relying on network-attached storage options. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. With dedicated CPU allocation and a balanced resource profile, this instance is configured for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application hosting, and containerized deployments.
